feature_title: Dashboard Custom Variable Default Value Resolution

rationale.edition: All changed files are under web/src/ (open-source UI paths) — specifically web/src/components/dashboards/ and web/src/composables/dashboard/. No paths under enterprise/, o2_enterprise/, or src/enterprise/. No enterprise keywords (cipher, SSO, SAML, RBAC, SDR, sensitive-data, logo-management) appear in the file paths.
rationale.skip: Not skipped. The change modifies dashboard custom variable default value resolution — a user-facing UI behavior (what value appears pre-selected when a dashboard loads). No explicit opt-out label or skip instruction was found in the trigger comment (empty) or feature hint (descriptive only).
rationale.e2e: E2E is warranted. The change alters which option is selected by default for custom dashboard variables — honoring the per-option 'Default' checkbox (option.selected) instead of always picking the first option. This is directly visible to users when dashboards load and should be verified in a real browser across single-select, multi-select, and fallback-to-first-option scenarios.
rationale.area: Dashboards — the changed source files live in web/src/components/dashboards/ and web/src/composables/dashboard/. The sibling E2E specs live under tests/ui-testing/playwright-tests/Dashboards/.
rationale.group: Dashboards-Settings — the existing dashboard-variables-setting.spec.js lives in this matrix shard, and this feature is about dashboard variable behavior (default value resolution for custom variables with per-option defaults).
rationale.existing_tests: No E2E specs in the diff. The changed test files are Vitest unit tests (web/src/components/dashboards/VariablesValueSelector.spec.ts and web/src/composables/dashboard/useVariablesManager.spec.ts), not Playwright E2E specs under tests/ui-testing/playwright-tests/.
